## Entities.Fillings.IScaledFillingIngredient interface

Scaled ingredient with original and scaled amounts. Used at runtime when computing scaled filling recipes; not typically persisted.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IScaledFillingIngredient extends IFillingIngredient 
```
**Extends:** IFillingIngredient
